name: GenerateImage
description: Generate an image from a text prompt using AI (Gemini). Returns the image inline and saves it to a file. The saved file path is included in the output.

prompt.description: A detailed description of the image to generate

name: EditImage
description: Edit an existing image using AI (Gemini). Accepts an image (file path or URL) and a text prompt describing the desired changes. Returns the modified image inline and saves it to a file.

prompt.description: Description of changes to make to the image

image_path.description: Path to a local image file to edit

image_url.description: URL of an image to download and edit
